title: Energy Statement: Release Health Shame
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for the shame around a health condition or body limitation
excerpt: A short energy statement practice for releasing the shame that attaches to a health condition, a body that doesn't work the way you want it to, or a limitation you have been carrying as a personal failing.
sourceNotes: Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure draws on the energy statement method from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you are carrying shame about a health condition, a physical limitation, or a body that is not doing what you want it to do.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice for the shame that attaches to ill health or physical limitation. Two statements said three times each: one releasing the shame, one allowing the body to be treated with care regardless of its condition.
I am ready to release the shame I carry about what my body cannot do. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow my body to receive care and respect, as it is right now. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure draws on the energy statement method from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
